features.name: Wim Hof Breathing
features.description: Wim Hof breathing timer. v1 ships a no-coordination MP3 player (play/pause/reset + progress bar). v2 will sync visual phases to the narrated audio via ticks.
done: Copy MP3 from dist/ to public/win_hof_4rounds.mp3
Build minimal WimHofTimer.jsx (HTMLAudioElement, play/pause/reset, elapsed+remaining display, progress bar)
Create WimHofTimer.scss (dark teal gradient, maximized layout)
Register card in TimersHome.jsx (icon 'air', accent #4ecdc4, sessionKey 'wimHof')
Increment session count on audio 'ended' event
Wire onFinish callback on audio end
Verify production build passes (npm run build)
todo: Mark phase transitions in Audacity (docs/WIM_HOF_AUDACITY.md) — produce scripts/wim_hof_labels.txt
Refactor WimHofTimer.jsx to drive phase UI from wimHofConfig (breathe/hold/recovery + round counter)
Add phase-colored backgrounds + instruction text per phase
Optional: switch from raw Audio() to WorkoutAudioPlayer for watchdog/drift correction (matches HIIT/Tabata sync model)
Add localStorage persistence (save/load WimHof state with 1h expiry, mirror HIIT/Tabata pattern)
Add E2E test: start timer, MP3 plays, completes → onFinish fires
Add v2 i18n keys (wimHof.breathe / hold / recovery / roundN)
Consider uploading MP3 to Supabase audio bucket (consistent with HIIT/Tabata) instead of public/
